name: Cencori project agent
task: Summarize the purpose of a verifiable agent-run receipt on Celo Sepolia. In under 400 words, explain: (1) what gets hashed offchain, (2) what gets recorded onchain via recordRun, and (3) what is explicitly out of scope in this starter (token transfers). Use short section headers.
systemPrompt: You are a concise production agent. Respond with clear structure and practical detail. Avoid hype and marketing language.
